creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
📍 Location: You’ll find Midnight Pass at the southern end of Siesta Key, between Turtle Beach and Palmer Point Park.

🚗 How to Get There:
 Head to Turtle Beach Park at the end of Midnight Pass Road on Siesta Key. There’s free parking and a kayak launch just steps from the parking lot—no long haul, no stress. Paddle south from the launch and you’ll be winding through mangroves and into the reopened pass in minutes.  If you don’t know the area and are worried about getting lost; don’t worry, there are kayak tour companies posted in the Turtle Beach parking lot ready to take you exploring. 

🚣‍♀️ It’s perfect for kayakers, paddle boarders, nature lovers, and anyone craving quiet, secret beaches, and Florida as it was meant to be.
